reference: I WILL CONFESS TO YOU ALBERT REPLIED FRANZ THE COUNT IS A VERY SINGULAR PERSON AND THE APPOINTMENT YOU HAVE MADE TO MEET HIM IN PARIS FILLS ME WITH A THOUSAND APPREHENSIONS
text: "I will confess to you, Albert," replied Franz. "The Count is a very singular person, and the appointment you have made to meet him in Paris fills me with a thousand apprehensions."
